HomePage.title: Clarity for the choices that shape your life
HomePage.description: Personal astrology consultations, accurate birth-chart insights and guided learning—available in English, Hindi and Gujarati.
HomePage.heroCard: Traditional insight. Thoughtful guidance. Your choices remain yours.

value.title: Insight that helps you move forward

personal.title: Personal to your chart
personal.description: Every consultation begins with your details, questions and current life context.

practical.title: Clear and practical
practical.description: Complex chart patterns are translated into grounded guidance you can actually use.

accessible.title: Built around you
accessible.description: Choose your language, currency and consultation focus without unnecessary friction.

services.title: Start with the guidance you need
services.description: Choose a focused consultation with clear duration and pricing. Your astrologer will tailor the conversation to your questions.

astrologers.title: Experienced, thoughtful astrologers
astrologers.description: Meet practitioners who combine classical knowledge with calm, respectful communication.

testimonials.title: Guidance that feels clear and human

insights.title: Latest insights

closing.title: Ready to begin with a clearer question?
closing.description: Explore a consultation that matches what you want to understand right now.
